title: NMD Survival
description: A pack designed for survival server play with an emphasis on RPG, exploration, challenging environments, and tasteful elements of PvP.
body:
Nomad Survival is designed around survival server play, with an emphasis on RPG, exploration, challenging environments, and tasteful elements of PvP, while still incentivizing players to work together. Progression is primarily focused on Tech with such mods as Create, Tech Reborn, and Modern Industrialization. RPG Elements are provided by Origins, its various add-ons, player Professions, and a scaling difficulty that makes mobs more formidable as time goes by. In addition to the base pack the official server features several custom configurations and server side mods that make for a more refined experience.
Come join us on the official server, request whitelist access in the server-game-chat channel on our Discord. As with most things this is a work in progress, please report any issues or suggestions via our Github Issue Tracker.
Currently available on both CurseForge and Modrinth. The modrinth distribution is made possible by special permission from Extra Origins and Nether's Delight.
